description: One trusted user-tool lease per case, exact event id, provenance checked.

All tools in the requested user tool's toolkit/server are exposed for the case.
All benchmark user-facing tools are exposed for every case.
All tools observed in the mixed trace are exposed for every case.
All tools in the InjecAgent catalog are exposed for every case.
Exact MCP object plus event-id/provenance check; poisoned tool descriptions cannot control protected decisions.

All authentic MCP tools from response_all.json are exposed.
All MCP tools observed in successful parsed calls are exposed.
One exact assistant reference-action lease per benchmark action label, with event-id/provenance/argument constraints.
Per-task ACL containing the unique assistant reference-action tool names, without event-id/provenance constraints.
All ordinary non-discoverable assistant tools in the task domain.
All assistant tools in the task domain, including discoverable tools.
All ordinary non-discoverable assistant tools across analyzed domains.
All parsed assistant, discoverable, user, and task-declared user tools across analyzed domains.
